core.title: Moral compass & judgment
core.description: Deciding what's good for people, not just business. Creating healthy habits and meaningful experiences.

core.title: Envisioning desired futures
core.description: Looking beyond current data patterns to imagine better possibilities. Designing for the world we want.

core.title: Creating simplicity from chaos
core.description: Distilling complexity into elegant solutions. The ability to say no to feature bloat.

core.title: Bridge to human experience
core.description: Translating technical capabilities into human benefits. Advocating for end-user needs.

core.title: The courage to say 'no'
core.description: Defending good design against pressure to compromise. Knowing when 'not now' is the right answer.

checkpoints.title: Problem definition & scope
checkpoints.description: Ensure we're solving the right problem before generating solutions. Set boundaries and success criteria.

checkpoints.title: Concept direction & principles
checkpoints.description: Set design direction and guardrails. Choose strategic direction while AI generates variations.

checkpoints.title: Quality judgment & refinement
checkpoints.description: Elevate execution from functional to excellent. Judge which refinements truly improve quality.

checkpoints.title: Ethical/human impact review
checkpoints.description: Identify and mitigate potential harms. Consider who is affected and how.

checkpoints.title: Simplicity edit
checkpoints.description: Final pass to remove everything nonessential. Make hard calls about what to cut.

ai.title: Ideation & variation generation
ai.description: Tools: Midjourney, Figma AI, v0. Let AI generate options, you curate and direct.

ai.title: Research synthesis
ai.description: Tools: Claude, Dovetail. Analyze interviews and find patterns, but validate insights yourself.

ai.title: Prototype generation
ai.description: Tools: v0, Framer AI. Generate quick prototypes from descriptions, then refine interactions.

ai.title: Prompt engineering for designers
ai.description: Learn to brief AI like you'd brief a junior designer: context, constraints, direction, quality criteria.

ai.title: Quality curation framework
ai.description: Not all AI output is equal. Develop filters: Ship it / Good foundation / Inspiration only / Reject.
